fact_nuggets.text: Mummy (Japanese: Mummy) is an Ability introduced in Generation V. It is the signature Ability of Yamask and Cofagrigus.
Signature Ability of Yamask And Cofagrigus

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Changes the Ability of the Pokemon that hit it with a direct attack to Mummy. * When the Pokemon is hit with a direct attack like Tackle or Scratch, the attacker's Ability becomes Mummy! * S MD When the Pokemon is hit with a contact move like Vine Whip or Iron Tail, the attacker's Ability becomes Mummy!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check if these Abilities are unaffected: Protosynthesis , Quark Drive , Orichalcum Pulse , Hadron Engine (also cf. Lingering Aroma ). You can discuss this on the talk page. When a Pokemon with Mummy is hit by a contact move, the attacker's Ability is changed to Mummy. The attacker regains its original Ability once it is switched out , faints , or the battle ends. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), the attacking Pokemon's Ability will become Mummy after the first strike. If a Pokemon with Rock Head uses a recoil contact move on a Pokemon with Mummy, its Ability will become Mummy, then subsequently it will take recoil damage. If a Pokemon with Parental Bond uses a contact move on a Pokemon with Mummy, the Pokemon's Ability will become Mummy after the first strike, then the current move will continue to strike a second time regardless. If a Pokemon with Skill Link uses a multistrike contact move on a Pokemon with Mummy, the Pokemon's Ability will become Mummy after the first strike, then the current move will continue to strike the maximum number of times regardless. As One , Battle Bond , Comatose , Commander , Disguise , Gulp Missile , Ice Face , Lingering Aroma , Multitype , Power Construct , RKS System , Schooling , Shields Down , Stance Change , Zen Mode , Zero to Hero , and Mummy itself are not affected by Mummy. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Mummy has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check if these Abilities are unaffected: Protosynthesis , Quark Drive , Orichalcum Pulse , Hadron Engine (also cf. Lingering Aroma ). You can discuss this on the talk page. If a Pokemon with Skill Link uses a multistrike contact move on a Pokemon with Mummy, the Pokemon's Ability will become Mummy after the first strike, then the current move will continue to strike the maximum number of times regardless. As One , Battle Bond , Comatose , Commander , Disguise , Gulp Missile , Ice Face , Lingering Aroma , Multitype , Power Construct , RKS System , Schooling , Shields Down , Stance Change , Zen Mode , Zero to Hero , and Mummy itself are not affected by Mummy.
Changes attacking Pokemon's abilities to Mummy on contact.
